name: Cindy's Crock Pot Meatloaf
recipeIngredient: 1 can tomato or cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak bread crumbs in milk.
2. Mix meat, seasonings, and soaked crumbs thoroughly.
3. Form the meat mixture into a loaf shape and pour the soup over top.
4. Bake in crock pot for 10 to 12 hours on low. If using an oven, bake at 350 degrees for 1 1/2 hours.
5. Add vegetables if desired; no one complained!
6. If using a food processor, make cracker or bread crumbs with the metal blade first. Then add them to the milk and use the shredding blade to shred the vegetables.
